name: Genre And Structure Fixtures
description: Propose a curated benchmark_fixture_library addition set for genre and structure fixtures.
related_rules: Every detected failure must be logged to an append-only structured failure ledger.
related_validators: Cluster failure-ledger entries periodically to identify systemic spikes by fixture, genre, style, failure type, and model version.
related_failure_modes: Template echo detector misclassifies genre-typical structures as template copies.

failure_modes: Template echo detector misclassifies genre-typical structures as template copies.
